---
title: "Untitled"
author: "Rachel Austin"
date: "2026-04-20"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
library(dplyr)
library(gtsummary)
library(tidyr)
library(openxlsx)
library(tidyverse)
library(gt)
```

```{r}
df <- read.xlsx("/Users/austinra/BIOS6624/Project 3/Data Processed/covariate_df.xlsx")
```

```{r}

#Claude helped create this code based on my specified table goals
# --- Define variable types ---
continuous_vars <- c("AGE", "SYSBP", "TOTCHOL", "BMI")
binary_vars     <- c("DIABETES", "BPMEDS", "CURSMOKE")
all_vars        <- c(continuous_vars, binary_vars)

# --- Reshape to long format ---
df_long <- df %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = -c(RANDID, STROKE, TIME_STROKE),
    names_to = c(".value", "period"),
    names_pattern = "^(\\D+)(\\d)$"
  ) %>%
  mutate(period = factor(period, levels = c("1","2","3"),
                         labels = c("Period 1", "Period 2", "Period 3")))

# --- Total N per period ---
total_n <- df_long %>%
  group_by(period) %>%
  summarise(total_N = sum(rowSums(!is.na(across(all_of(all_vars)))) > 0),
            .groups = "drop")

# --- Summarise continuous vars ---
cont_summary <- df_long %>%
  group_by(period) %>%
  summarise(across(all_of(continuous_vars),
                   list(n    = ~sum(!is.na(.)),
                        mean = ~mean(., na.rm = TRUE),
                        sd   = ~sd(.,   na.rm = TRUE)),
                   .names = "{.col}__{.fn}"),
            .groups = "drop") %>%
  pivot_longer(-period, names_to = c("variable", "stat"), names_sep = "__") %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = stat, values_from = value) %>%
  mutate(
    summary  = paste0(round(mean, 1), " (", round(sd, 1), ")"),
    n        = as.integer(n),
    var_group = variable,          # parent label
    level    = NA_character_,      # no level for continuous
    indent   = FALSE
  ) %>%
  select(var_group, level, indent, variable, period, n, summary)

# --- Summarise binary vars: one row per level (0 and 1) ---
bin_summary <- df_long %>%
  select(period, all_of(binary_vars)) %>%
  pivot_longer(-period, names_to = "variable", values_to = "value") %>%
  filter(!is.na(value)) %>%
  group_by(period, variable) %>%
  mutate(total_n_var = n()) %>%
  group_by(period, variable, value, total_n_var) %>%
  summarise(count = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
  mutate(
    pct     = round(100 * count / total_n_var, 1),
    summary = paste0(count, " (", pct, "%)"),  # n (%) format — more informative than % alone
    n       = as.integer(total_n_var),
    level   = case_when(
      variable == "DIABETES" & value == 0 ~ "No Diabetes",
      variable == "DIABETES" & value == 1 ~ "Diabetes",
      variable == "BPMEDS"   & value == 0 ~ "No BP Medication",
      variable == "BPMEDS"   & value == 1 ~ "BP Medication",
      variable == "CURSMOKE" & value == 0 ~ "Non-Smoker",
      variable == "CURSMOKE" & value == 1 ~ "Current Smoker",
      TRUE ~ as.character(value)
    ),
    var_group = variable,
    indent    = TRUE                          # flag for indenting level rows
  ) %>%
  arrange(variable, value) %>%
  select(var_group, level, indent, variable = level, period, n, summary)
  # ^^^ use level label as the display "variable" for the row

# --- Combine ---
# We need header rows for binary vars (just the var name, no summary)
bin_headers <- bin_summary %>%
  distinct(var_group) %>%
  mutate(
    level     = NA_character_,
    indent    = FALSE,
    variable  = recode(var_group,
                       DIABETES = "Diabetes",
                       BPMEDS   = "BP Medication",
                       CURSMOKE = "Current Smoker (%)"),
    period    = NA,
    n         = NA_integer_,
    summary   = NA_character_
  )

# Recode continuous var labels
cont_summary <- cont_summary %>%
  mutate(variable = recode(variable,
                           AGE     = "Age (years)",
                           SYSBP   = "Systolic BP (mmHg)",
                           TOTCHOL = "Total Cholesterol (mg/dL)",
                           BMI     = "BMI (kg/m²)"))

# --- Define display order ---
var_order <- c(
  "AGE", "SYSBP", "TOTCHOL", "BMI",
  "DIABETES", "BPMEDS", "CURSMOKE"
)

all_long <- bind_rows(
  cont_summary %>% mutate(sort_key = match(var_group, var_order), level_key = 0),
  bin_headers  %>% mutate(sort_key = match(var_group, var_order), level_key = 0),
  bin_summary  %>% mutate(sort_key = match(var_group, var_order),
                          level_key = if_else(grepl("No |Non-", variable), 1, 2))
) %>%
  arrange(sort_key, level_key)

# --- Widen by period ---
all_wide <- all_long %>%
  filter(!is.na(period)) %>%
  pivot_wider(
    id_cols     = c(var_group, level, indent, variable, sort_key, level_key),
    names_from  = period,
    values_from = c(n, summary),
    names_glue  = "{period}_{.value}"
  ) %>%
  arrange(sort_key, level_key)

# Add header rows back (they have no period data)
header_rows <- all_long %>%
  filter(is.na(period)) %>%
  select(var_group, level, indent, variable, sort_key, level_key) %>%
  mutate(
    `Period 1_n` = NA_integer_, `Period 1_summary` = "",   
    `Period 2_n` = NA_integer_, `Period 2_summary` = "",
    `Period 3_n` = NA_integer_, `Period 3_summary` = ""
  )
final_tbl <- bind_rows(all_wide, header_rows) %>%
  arrange(sort_key, level_key) %>%
  select(indent, variable,
         `Period 1_n`, `Period 1_summary`,
         `Period 2_n`, `Period 2_summary`,
         `Period 3_n`, `Period 3_summary`) %>%
  mutate(across(ends_with("_summary"), ~if_else(is.na(.), "", .))) %>%
  mutate(across(ends_with("_n"), ~as.character(.))) %>%
  mutate(across(ends_with("_n"), ~if_else(is.na(.), "", .)))

# --- N labels for spanners ---
n_labels <- total_n %>% deframe()

# --- Identify rows to indent (binary level rows) ---
indent_rows <- which(final_tbl$indent)

# --- Render with gt ---
final_tbl %>%
  select(-indent) %>%
  gt() %>%
  cols_label(
    variable           = "Variable",
    `Period 1_n`       = "n", `Period 1_summary` = "Value",
    `Period 2_n`       = "n", `Period 2_summary` = "Value",
    `Period 3_n`       = "n", `Period 3_summary` = "Value"
  ) %>%
  tab_spanner(
    label   = md(paste0("**Period 1**<br>N = ", n_labels["Period 1"])),
    columns = c(`Period 1_n`, `Period 1_summary`)
  ) %>%
  tab_spanner(
    label   = md(paste0("**Period 2**<br>N = ", n_labels["Period 2"])),
    columns = c(`Period 2_n`, `Period 2_summary`)
  ) %>%
  tab_spanner(
    label   = md(paste0("**Period 3**<br>N = ", n_labels["Period 3"])),
    columns = c(`Period 3_n`, `Period 3_summary`)
  ) %>%
  # Indent the level rows
 tab_style(
    style     = cell_text(weight = "bold"),
    locations = cells_body(
      columns = variable,
      rows    = which(final_tbl$`Period 1_summary` == "")  # match "" instead of is.na()
    )
  ) %>%
  # Bold the binary header rows (no summary values)
  tab_style(
    style     = cell_text(weight = "bold"),
    locations = cells_body(
      columns = variable,
      rows = which(final_tbl$`Period 1_summary` == "")
    )
  ) %>%
  tab_footnote("n = total non-missing for that variable. Continuous: Mean (SD); Binary: n (%).") %>%
  tab_style(
    style     = cell_text(weight = "bold"),
    locations = cells_column_spanners()
  ) %>%
  opt_row_striping() %>%
  opt_table_font(font = "Calibri") %>%
  tab_options(
    table.font.size           = 13,
    heading.align             = "left",
    column_labels.font.weight = "bold"
  )


```
